message:
test(proptest): add 24 property-based tests for storage.rs record types (ft-c5y9p)

Covers serde roundtrips and invariants for WorkflowRecord, AuditActionRecord,
AuditStreamRecord, ActionUndoRecord, NotificationHistoryRecord, SavedSearchRecord,
PaneBookmarkRecord, TimelineQuery builder, ActionHistoryRecord, and NotificationStatus.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
